description: This file defines the AppUserRepository interface, which extends JpaRepository to provide data access methods for AppUser entities, including a custom method to find users by email ignoring case.

classes.name: AppUserRepository
classes.description: Repository interface for managing AppUser entities, extending JpaRepository with an additional method to find users by email case-insensitively.

methods.name: findByEmailIgnoreCase
methods.description: Finds an AppUser by email address, ignoring case differences.
